name: agent-benchmark
description: Run the same Claude Code task across multiple config variants and compare results

scripts.build: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.docs:preview: npm run docs:build && npx serve docs/dist
scripts.format: prettier --write lib/ bin/ test/ docs/ '*.md' eslint.config.js package.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check lib/ bin/ test/ docs/ '*.md' eslint.config.js package.json
